languages.text: "Около двух стандартных циклов назад астропаты приняли зов о помощи, отправленный знатными родами планеты. Аристократия стремительно теряла контроль над подданными, и решение требовалось принять немедленно. Вы же находились вне флагмана, а связаться с вами я не смог, Лорд-капитан. Ваш предок принял на себя бремя ответственности и санкционировал отправку зарковских гвардейцев на миссию умиротворения".

traits.locale_text: "Около двух стандартных циклов назад астропаты приняли зов о помощи, отправленный знатными родами планеты. Аристократия стремительно теряла контроль над подданными, и решение требовалось принять немедленно. Вы же находились вне флагмана, а связаться с вами я не смог, Лорд-капитан. Благородный Себериан принял на себя бремя ответственности и санкционировал отправку зарковских гвардейцев на миссию умиротворения".
traits.speaker: HighFactotum

languages.text: "Approximately two standard cycles ago, the Astropaths received a plea for aid dispatched by the planet's noble houses. The aristocracy was rapidly losing control of its subjects, and a decision was required without delay. You were away from the flagship at the time, Lord Captain, and I could not reach you. Your ancestor assumed the burden of responsibility and authorised the dispatch of Zarkovian Guardsmen on a pacification mission."
languages.original_text: "Около двух стандартных циклов назад астропаты приняли зов о помощи, отправленный знатными родами планеты. languages.text: «Hace aproximadamente dos ciclos estándar, los astrópatas captaron una llamada de auxilio enviada por las casas nobiliarias del planeta. La aristocracia estaba perdiendo el control de sus súbditos, y era menester tomar una decisión sin demora. En ese momento usted se había ausentado de la nave insignia, Lord Capitán, y no hubo forma de contactar con su equipo. Su antepasado asumió la responsabilidad y autorizó el despliegue de un destacamento de guardias de Zarkov en misión de pacificación».
languages.original_text: "Approximately two standard cycles ago, the Astropaths received a plea for aid dispatched by the planet's noble houses. The aristocracy was rapidly losing control of its subjects, and a decision was required without delay. You were away from the flagship at the time, Lord Captain, and I could not reach you. Your ancestor assumed the burden of responsibility and authorised the dispatch of Zarkovian Guardsmen on a pacification mission."

traits.locale_text: «Hace aproximadamente dos ciclos estándar, los astrópatas captaron una llamada de auxilio enviada por las casas nobiliarias del planeta. La aristocracia estaba perdiendo el control de sus súbditos, y era menester tomar una decisión sin demora. En ese momento usted se había ausentado de la nave insignia, Lord Capitán, y no hubo forma de contactar con su equipo. Su antepasado asumió la responsabilidad y autorizó el despliegue de un destacamento de guardias de Zarkov en misión de pacificación».

languages.text: “大约两个标准周期前，星语者收到了该行星的贵族发出的求援信号。当时贵族阶层很快就要失去对臣民的掌控，必须立刻做出决策。那时您不在旗舰上，舰长大人，我又联系不上您。于是您的先祖主动担起了责任，授权扎尔科夫卫兵前去执行镇压行动。”
languages.original_text: "Approximately two standard cycles ago, the Astropaths received a plea for aid dispatched by the planet's noble houses. The aristocracy was rapidly losing control of its subjects, and a decision was required without delay. You were away from the flagship at the time, Lord Captain, and I could not reach you. Your ancestor assumed the burden of responsibility and authorised the dispatch of Zarkovian Guardsmen on a pacification mission."

traits.locale_text: “大约两个标准周期前，星语者收到了该行星的贵族发出的求援信号。当时贵族阶层很快就要失去对臣民的掌控，必须立刻做出决策。那时您不在旗舰上，舰长大人，我又联系不上您。于是您的先祖主动担起了责任，授权扎尔科夫卫兵前去执行镇压行动。”

languages.text: « Il y a environ deux cycles standard, les astropathes ont reçu une demande d'assistance en provenance des nobles maisons de la planète. L'aristocratie perdait rapidement le contrôle de ses sujets, et il fallait prendre une décision sans délai. Vous ne vous trouviez pas à bord du vaisseau amiral à ce moment-là, et je n'avais aucun moyen de vous contacter. Votre ancêtre a pris sur lui d'autoriser le déploiement de gardes zarkoviens dans le cadre d'une mission de pacification. »
languages.original_text: "Approximately two standard cycles ago, the Astropaths received a plea for aid dispatched by the planet's noble houses. The aristocracy was rapidly losing control of its subjects, and a decision was required without delay. You were away from the flagship at the time, Lord Captain, and I could not reach you. Your ancestor assumed the burden of responsibility and authorised the dispatch of Zarkovian Guardsmen on a pacification mission."

traits.locale_text: « Il y a environ deux cycles standard, les astropathes ont reçu une demande d'assistance en provenance des nobles maisons de la planète. Votre ancêtre a pris sur lui d'autoriser le déploiement de gardes zarkoviens dans le cadre d'une mission de pacification. »

languages.text: "Yaklaşık iki standart döngü önce astropatlar, gezegenin soylu hanelerince gönderilmiş bir yardım çağrısı aldı. Aristokrasi, tebaa üzerindeki kontrolünü hızla kaybediyordu ve gecikmeksizin bir karar verilmesi gerekiyordu. O sırada sancak gemisinde değildiniz Lord Kaptan, size ulaşamadım. Atanız sorumluluk yükünü üstlendi ve Zarkov Muhafızları'nın bir baskılama görevi için gönderilmesine yetki verdi."
languages.original_text: "Approximately two standard cycles ago, the Astropaths received a plea for aid dispatched by the planet's noble houses. The aristocracy was rapidly losing control of its subjects, and a decision was required without delay. You were away from the flagship at the time, Lord Captain, and I could not reach you. Your ancestor assumed the burden of responsibility and authorised the dispatch of Zarkovian Guardsmen on a pacification mission."

traits.locale_text: "Yaklaşık iki standart döngü önce astropatlar, gezegenin soylu hanelerince gönderilmiş bir yardım çağrısı aldı. Aristokrasi, tebaa üzerindeki kontrolünü hızla kaybediyordu ve gecikmeksizin bir karar verilmesi gerekiyordu. O sırada sancak gemisinde değildiniz Lord Kaptan, size ulaşamadım. Atanız sorumluluk yükünü üstlendi ve Zarkov Muhafızları'nın bir baskılama görevi için gönderilmesine yetki verdi."

languages.text: 「およそ2サイクル前、アストロパスの受信した貴族たちの助けを求める電報。貴族たちは急速に民衆の支配を失い、即座の決断が必要だった。その時にあなたは旗艦から離れていた。連絡が取れなかった。祖先が責任を負い、ザルコヴィアン・ガードの派遣を許可したのだ。」
languages.original_text: "Approximately two standard cycles ago, the Astropaths received a plea for aid dispatched by the planet's noble houses. The aristocracy was rapidly losing control of its subjects, and a decision was required without delay. You were away from the flagship at the time, Lord Captain, and I could not reach you. Your ancestor assumed the burden of responsibility and authorised the dispatch of Zarkovian Guardsmen on a pacification mission."

traits.locale_text: 「およそ2サイクル前、アストロパスの受信した貴族たちの助けを求める電報。貴族たちは急速に民衆の支配を失い、即座の決断が必要だった。その時にあなたは旗艦から離れていた。連絡が取れなかった。祖先が責任を負い、ザルコヴィアン・ガードの派遣を許可したのだ。」

languages.text: "Vor etwa zwei Standardzyklen erreichte die Astropathen ein Hilfegesuch der Adelshäuser des Planeten. Die Aristokratie verlor die Kontrolle über ihre Untertanen und es musste umgehend eine Entscheidung getroffen werden. Ihr wart damals nicht auf dem Flaggschiff, Lord Captain, und ich konnte Euch nicht erreichen. Euer Ahnherr übernahm daraufhin die Verantwortung und autorisierte die Entsendung einer Abteilung zarkovianischer Gardisten für eine Friedensmission."
languages.original_text: "Approximately two standard cycles ago, the Astropaths received a plea for aid dispatched by the planet's noble houses. The aristocracy was rapidly losing control of its subjects, and a decision was required without delay. You were away from the flagship at the time, Lord Captain, and I could not reach you. Your ancestor assumed the burden of responsibility and authorised the dispatch of Zarkovian Guardsmen on a pacification mission."
